payload.tactic: while{2} (0 <= i{2} <= size ns{2} /\ ns{2} = undup (map (fun (p : ciphertext) => p.`1) Mem.lc{2}) /\ Mem.lc{1} = Mem.lc{2} /\ RO.m{1} = RO.m{2} /\ Mem.k{1} = Mem.k{2} /\ (forall (c : ciphertext), (c \in Mem.lc{2}) => dec RO.m{2} Mem.k{2} c <> None => (c.`1 \in take i{2} ns{2}) => forged{2})) (size ns{2} - i{2}).

manager_note: Committed tactic accepted; the EasyCrypt proof state changed.
